_comment: GigaAM Multilingual per-tensor tolerances for compare_tensors.py.
GigaAM-v3 tolerances). The multilingual CTC variant shares tensor
NAMES with v3 but has a different 71-class head and different
encoder weights, so its drift budget is tracked independently to
avoid clobbering v3's signed-off values. The variant manifest
PROVISIONAL — magnitude-aware Stage 2 budgets, NOT finalized:
max_abs  = max(1e-4 * p99_abs, 1e-6)   # 0.01% of typical large value
mean_abs = max(1e-5 * rms,     1e-6)   # 0.001% of RMS energy
Derived from the samples/ru.wav reference dump under
finalizes these against observed C++-vs-reference drift and removes
the flags. DO NOT SHIP while _provisional entries remain.
